calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-269b V_s gating + MECH-295 liking-bridge factorial (Q-040b behavioural sufficiency)
items.note: Successor (NOT supersede) of V3-EXQ-490b. 490b PASSed C1 (gate fires) but FAILed C2/C3 (zero approach_commit + zero dACC bias) -- governance walk 2026-04-28T22Z routes evidence to MECH-295 liking-bridge as the dominant remaining blocker. Bridge substrate landed 2026-04-26 (V3-EXQ-493 UC1-UC6 PASS). 490c holds use_vs_rollout_gating=True in BOTH arms (with the same smoke threshold override 0.85/0.85/0.95 carried from 490b -- Q-040a is already answered PASS so we re-verify via C1 only) and toggles use_mech295_liking_bridge OFF/ON. PASS = C1 (gate fires both arms) AND C2 (ON_ON approach > ON_OFF AND ON_ON approach > 0 in >=2/3 seeds) AND C3 (ON_ON dACC bias > ON_OFF AND > 0) AND C4 (severance: bridge cue_fires == 0 in ON_OFF AND > 0 in ON_ON). PASS supports Q-040b architectural reading (V_s + liking bridge jointly unblock the EXQ-483 wired-but-inert phenotype). FAIL on C2/C3 with C1+C4 PASSing routes evidence further upstream (VALENCE_LIKING write geometry, GoalState seeding from z_resource, downstream BG/E3 score_bias composition). Tagged Q-040 only per claim_ids accuracy rule. experiment_purpose=evidence (bridge OFF/ON is the falsifiable severed-bridge signature for MECH-295 weak reading at the behavioural level).
